backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application backend on the Internet Computer.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading SunCalc via CDN and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin control panel component managing journeys, schedules, travel spots, music albums, and geographical data, using journey title as the unique schedule key.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor to the browser console as window.backend for debugging, logging available commands and the current user's principal and role.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: Component for managing city media albums, supporting file uploads (images/videos), social media link management with real-time URL validation, and per-city album browsing.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing geographical city data sourced from Geonames, supporting paginated browsing, search, CSV file import, and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A React component that renders a 10-heart rating widget supporting full, partial, and empty heart states with hover effects, click-based fractional ratings (0.1 increments), and optional read-only mode.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-based interactive 3D globe component with features including timezone overlays, city markers, country borders/labels, solar terminator/twilight rendering, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: A scrapbook-styled itinerary dialog component that renders a journey's schedule grouped by day using a hand-drawn/doodle aesthetic with Comic Sans typography and warm amber color themes.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: A React component that renders a vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying date ranges, scheduled days, and activities fetched via `useGetJourneyScheduleWithDays`.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a named map location, handling image file selection, upload to blob storage, and persistence via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: A dialog-based authentication panel that handles Internet Identity login/logout, displays the user's principal ID, and shows authentication status with appropriate loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, bookmarks, and schedule items as custom markers, with popups showing ratings, media galleries, and social links, supporting focused navigation and journey filtering.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube/Instagram) with carousel navigation and fullscreen support.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file uploads for songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with authentication and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that manages audio playback for songs fetched from music albums.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: An admin component for uploading and persisting timezone GeoJSON data to the backend canister, with IndexedDB caching and multi-step verification.
A collapsible panel component that displays journeys grouped by live/upcoming/past status, allowing users to view and edit schedule items, trigger flight animations on a map, and render itineraries in Doodle or Retro styles.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A React component for managing travel spots with full CRUD operations, supporting media file uploads, social media link attachments, city filtering, and heart-based ratings via a dialog-based form UI.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel component that aggregates and displays travel spots and map bookmarks grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel dialog for configuring website layout preferences such as toggling the music player bar, setting the default map search location, and adjusting display options like ripple size and city font size.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks and mutations for the frontend, covering journeys, locations, media, music, schedules, and more, along with geocoding utilities and social media URL validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, music player), and includes utility overrides for heading colors and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that iterates over GeoJSON timezone features and returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (in quarter-hour increments) using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data, prioritizing IndexedDB then a backend fetch, with helpers for opening IndexedDB and validating the data structure.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Provides utilities for rendering timezone boundary overlays on a 3D globe using Three.js, including coordinate conversion, longitude unwrapping, timezone offset lookup with DST awareness, and overlay group management.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page component that manages state for location search, 2D/3D view toggling, travel spots, timezone display, flight animations, and renders map, globe, and various panel components.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for assigning day labels (D1, D2, …), colors, and human-readable date strings to schedule items based on their chronological day index.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups schedule items by calendar day, sorts them chronologically by time, and builds per-day route coordinate arrays for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Globe Explorer project, specifically an incremental migration of time controls (Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles and time button) from the right bottom panel to the left-side controls panel, with three pending action requests.
